scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n domain,session,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "corepack pnpm dev:domain" "node ./scripts/wait-for-domain-dist.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/session dev" "node ./scripts/wait-for-domain-dist.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/web dev"
scripts.dev:session: corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/session dev
scripts.dev:web: corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/web dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/domain build && corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/session build && corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @project-game/domain build && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
